summary: Explored Vijdons codebase for order history navigation, taxi meter state, and unclickable order bug. Production app is WebView wrapper (main.dart) loading Django driver templates; native Flutter screens exist but are not the production entry. Root causes identified: (1) history.html is a separate page without access to home.html taximeter JS globals—relies on sessionStorage vijdon_tmx_{id} written by _tmxTick, which stops on navigation and may be empty before first tick; server fallback tmx_dist_km often 0 early in trip. (2) Unclickable main order likely sheet-overlay (#sheet-overlay z-100) not fully dismissed—pointerEvents/hidden class race or WebView bfcache restoring page with overlay blocking clicks. No Redux/Provider—state is setState (Flutter) or JS globals + sessionStorage (web).
current_status: Bug analysis complete. Relevant files and root causes documented for parent agent to implement fixes in home.html, history.html, and optionally Flutter history_screen.dart.
